delete-confirm.description: This will permanently delete the webhook endpoint and all delivery history. This action cannot be undone.
delete-confirm.title: Delete webhook?

webhooks.description: Configure webhook endpoints to receive real-time notifications when events occur in your organization.

empty.description: Create your first webhook to start receiving event notifications.
empty.title: No webhooks configured

form.create-description: Configure a new webhook endpoint to receive event notifications.
form.description-placeholder: What is this webhook used for?
form.events-required: At least one event must be selected
form.name: Name
form.url-hint: HTTPS is required in production. Events will be sent as POST requests.

logs.description: Recent webhook delivery attempts and their results.
logs.title: Delivery Logs

secret-dialog.description: This secret is used to verify webhook signatures. Store it securely.
secret-dialog.title: Webhook Secret
secret-dialog.verification-hint: Verify webhook signatures using HMAC-SHA256. The signature is sent in the X-Z8-Signature header.
secret-dialog.warning: This secret will only be shown once. Make sure to save it now.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
